flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southern Nazarene University rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($18.8k → $21.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Nazarene University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.0k → $31.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern Nazarene University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.0k → $31.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Nazarene University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
